mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade (delivery_address, delivery_type, status, trade_price, buyer_id, post_id, seller_id) VALUES (#{deliveryAddress}, #{deliveryType}, #{status}, #{tradePrice}, #{buyerId}, #{postId}, #{sellerId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trade WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY trade_id DESC
SELECT * FROM trade WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY trade_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE trade SET status = #{status} WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
